calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-12-2009 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-12-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: Joseph A. Sacramento, Esq. for plaintiff Ed Litke with property manager, Dolores Malatag present.
Andrew Cho, Esq. appearing on limited scope representation for defendant Allison Blum, who is also present.

This cause comes on regularly for settlement conference. Settlement discussions held. The case settled. Parties enter into a signed Stipulation for Entry of Future Judgment, which is then filed. Trial date vacated.

JPT: Andy Westley, Clerk Clark Banayad, not reported (218)
